metadata.description: Delivery format rules — FIXED softgel composition, Mg bisglycinate capsule, probiotic capsule, sachet.

hard_capsule_probiotic.label: Probiotic Capsule
hard_capsule_probiotic.description: Probiotic strains in vegetarian hard capsule

softgel.label: Omega + Antioxidant Softgel
softgel.description: FIXED composition — everyone who needs any component gets the whole softgel
softgel.note: This is a pre-mixed softgel. Cannot add/remove individual components. Check contraindications from questionnaire but mix is generally safe.

magnesium_capsule.label: Magnesium Bisglycinate Capsule
magnesium_capsule.timing_note: Magnesium is ALWAYS evening (1-2h before bed) regardless of sleep goal. Timing does not vary — only dosing (1 vs 2 capsules) depends on need scoring.
magnesium_capsule.description: Magnesium bisglycinate for sleep, sport recovery, and stress

dosing_logic.2_capsules: ≥2 needs out of 3 (e.g., sleep+sport, sleep+stress, sport+stress, all 3)

sleep.description: Sleep quality ≤7/10 OR sleep improvement is a stated goal

sport.description: Regular exercise (moderate+) or active sport goals

stress.description: Stress ≥6/10 OR stress/mood is a stated goal

magnesium_capsule.exclusivity: Only Mg delivery — no Mg in sachet or other capsules

sachet.description: Prebiotic fiber + water-soluble vitamins + amino acids/botanicals. NO magnesium (goes in separate capsule).

evening_capsule.label: Evening Capsule
evening_capsule.description: Evening capsule for sleep aids, calming adaptogens, and LLM-assigned evening supplements

unit_count_limits.note: People who receive Mg capsules may have up to 8 total units. 6 preferred.

assignment_rules.rule: All probiotics go in hard capsule. If total weight >650mg, split or redistribute CFU.
FIXED softgel composition. Not customizable per client.
Vitamin D and E are already in fixed softgel. NO additional doses in sachet.
Magnesium ONLY in bisglycinate capsule (evening). Never in sachet. 1 or 2 capsules based on need scoring.
B-complex, Vitamin C, folate, B12 etc. go in sachet.
Iron, Zinc, Calcium, etc. go in sachet.
L-Theanine, L-Glutamine, etc. go in sachet.
Ashwagandha, adaptogens, etc. go in sachet.

softgel.formula: FIXED at ~750mg per softgel — no calculation needed

magnesium_capsule.formula: FIXED at 750mg per capsule — no calculation needed

capsule_only_substances.description: Substances that must remain in capsule form (not sachet) due to taste, stability, or bioavailability
capsule_only_substances.reason: Bitter, pungent, or resinous taste makes sachet (dissolved in water) unpalatable. Must be encapsulated.

polyphenol_delivery_classification.description: Polyphenol-specific delivery routing for the polyphenol diversity rule. Polyphenols are bitter/irritating and need capsule delivery, except sachet-safe ones.

capsule_only_tier_1.description: Bitter polyphenols that can share evening capsule headroom (small enough)

capsule_only_tier_2.description: Large polyphenols that need their own dedicated capsule (too big to share)

piperine_rule.description: Whenever curcumin is added, piperine MUST be added at 1:100 ratio. Piperine enhances curcumin bioavailability by 2000%. This is enforced deterministically in Stage D.1c.

sachet_safe.description: Mild-tasting polyphenols that can go in the sachet

apple_polyphenol_extract.note: Up to 1200mg safe in 12-week studies, 600mg for long-term. >1000mg may benefit athletes.

sachet_safe.budget_rule: Remaining polyphenol budget = 1000mg - total_capsule_polyphenols. If budget is 0, no sachet polyphenols.

polyphenol_dedicated_capsule.label: Polyphenol Capsule (Dedicated)
polyphenol_dedicated_capsule.description: Dedicated capsule for Tier 2 polyphenols (Curcumin+Piperine or Bergamot) that are too large to share with evening capsule
